_comment: This file lives on your central update server (e.g. updates.raynet-liverpool.net/modules.json). Each group's install polls this to check for available updates.

announcements.name: Announcements
announcements.description: Post news and announcements to your group website.
announcements.changelog: Added member-only post visibility. Fixed pagination bug.

callouts.name: Callout Log
callouts.description: Log and track RAYNET callouts and incidents.

netlog.name: Net Logging
netlog.description: Record radio net sessions, check-ins, and messages.
